news.summary: In June 2025, Jarritos, the popular Mexican soft drink company, will unveil the third edition of a replica of the kitchen and recipes from the Kahlo family home. This exhibit showcases the kitchen and recipes that were once shared with the public by the renowned Mexican artist Frida Kahlo (1907-1954) and her family.
news.headline: Replica of Frida Kahlo's kitchen in Washington DC by Los Sabores De Mi México. Jarritos presents third edition in June 2025.

news.summary: Polaris Inc. (NYSE: PII) released its 2024 Geared For Good Report on May 22, 2025. The report showcases Polaris' dedication to serving its employees, riders, communities, and the environment. As a steward, Polaris remains committed to its values, emphasizing its role in promoting positive impact.
news.headline: Polaris released the 2024 Geared For Good Report showcasing commitment to employees, riders, and communities.

news.summary: In San Francisco, COVU, Inc., a top provider of AI-powered customer service for the insurance sector, declared the purchase of Uno Insurance Services. Uno Insurance Services, a quickly expanding agency from Texas, notably active in Houston's Spanish-speaking neighborhoods, has showcased revenue growth via focused acquisitions. This acquisition, COVU's second overall and first significant one in the Texas region, emphasizes the scalability of its platform. The move underlines COVU's intention to strengthen its presence in the market.
news.headline: COVU buys Uno Insurance Services in Texas to expand AI-native insurance services; 2nd acquisition, marks entry into TX.

news.summary: In April, the US housing market experienced a slowdown as sales of existing homes dropped to the lowest level in six months. This decline is believed to be caused by high interest rates and decreasing consumer confidence. Data from the National Association of Realtors indicates that existing home sales in April decreased by 0.5% from the previous month, amounting to a seasonally adjusted annualized rate of 4 million units. This marks a 2% decrease from the same period last year and is the slowest pace since October. Despite housing economists predicting a 2.7% increase, the actual sales figures fell short, likely impacted by closings finalized in February and March preceding the uptick in mortgage rates.
news.headline: US existing home sales hit 6-month low in April at 4 million units, down 0.5% from March due to high interest rates.
Elis plans annual meeting on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: In London on May 22, 2025, it was reported that payment tokenization remains prominent in the payments sector due to its effectiveness in reducing vulnerabilities and lessening the effect of unsuccessful card authorizations. The evolving payment tokenization methods are reinforcing its position as a preferred payment security measure. This trend underscores the importance of staying ahead in the realm of digital transactions.
news.headline: High profile cyberattacks drive rapid adoption of payment tokenization, leading to a $1 billion market in the US.

news.summary: The launch of the device will occur in four stages, where current Solana SBT holders will have early access. During this period, holders can receive rebates of up to $70 in SOL.
news.headline: New Solana-branded Ledger Flex hardware wallets launch in four phases, offering existing Solana SBT holders up to $70 in SOL rebates.

news.summary: The main objective of Glider is to make managing a crypto portfolio accessible to everyone, as stated by founder Brian Huang.
news.headline: Glider innovates with automated crypto portfolio management, making it accessible to all. Founder Brian Huang aims to lower the barrier to entry.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California on May 22, 2025, it was reported that there is an ongoing issue with educator shortages affecting districts nationwide, including both urban and rural areas. A survey conducted by Study.com revealed that 75% of employees in K-12 school districts believe that a potential solution to this problem is readily available.
news.headline: Educator shortages persist nationwide, Study.com survey suggests 75% believe apprenticeship programs can help close gaps.
AM Best confirms ratings for Coface's key operating units.

news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona on May 22, 2025, Plugged In Recovery has introduced a new outpatient program to meet the increasing demand for quality addiction and mental health treatment services. This initiative aims to provide a comprehensive care approach that extends the full continuum of services, ultimately enhancing long-term outcomes for individuals seeking help. With a focus on flexibility and top-notch care, the program seeks to address the needs of the community. This move comes as numbers show a rise in individuals seeking addiction treatment and mental health services, emphasizing the importance of accessible and high-quality care options.
news.headline: Plugged In Recovery launches outpatient program in Chandler, AZ, to meet rising demand for addiction and mental health treatment.

news.summary: Kong Inc., a prominent developer of cloud API technologies, has declared the expansion of its headquarters in San Francisco, showcasing the company's dedication to the Bay Area as a hub for technological innovation and top-tier talent. The announcement was made on May 22, 2025. This move underlines the company's intention to solidify its presence in a region renowned for its cutting-edge technology developments.
news.headline: Kong Inc. expands with new headquarters in downtown San Francisco, reinforcing commitment to tech hub.

news.summary: In McLean, Virginia on May 22, 2025, Freddie Mac shared data from its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ), revealing that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.86%.
news.headline: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage at 6.86% as of May 22, 2025.

news.summary: A milestone has been achieved by Minneapolis medical device company Phraxis Inc. as the FDA has approved their EndoForce™ Connector for Endovascular Venous Anastomosis (EndoForce™). This approval marks a significant step in dialysis access technology, signifying a pivotal advancement. This development positions Phraxis Inc. as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Phraxis receives FDA approval for EndoForce™ Connector for dialysis access, advancing innovation.

news.summary: Glider, a crypto portfolio management platform that does not require custody, emerged victorious in the Start in Block challenge during Paris Blockchain Week. The competition, evaluated by the high-frequency trading firm Auros, was won by Glider's team, led by Co-Founder Brian Huang. Decrypt recently hosted a discussion between Brian Huang and Auros' Chief Commercial Officer Jason Atkins, where they highlighted how Glider empowers retail crypto investors to execute their trading strategies seamlessly through automated features.
news.headline: Glider Co-Founder Brian Huang discusses democratizing crypto with Auros, winners of Paris Blockchain Week contest.

news.summary: Price increases in Opportunity Zones, which are designated for economic revitalization, have stabilized alongside the rest of the U.S. housing market during the slow winter season. ATTOM, a prominent provider of land and real estate analytics, disclosed this information on May 22, 2025, from their headquarters in Irvine, California.
news.headline: Home prices in Opportunity Zones align with national trends in Q1 2025. Price gains settling during slow winter period.

news.summary: A collaboration has been formed between DiGiovanni's innovative vision and Raptive's top-notch knowledge to enhance the newest brand from the culinary content creator on various platforms. This partnership was disclosed by Raptive, the foremost creator media company globally, on May 22, 2025 in New York.
news.headline: Celebrity chef Nick DiGiovanni and Raptive partner to launch 'Nick's Kitchen' site, expanding brand across platforms.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in New York City, Lancôme Juicy Tubes debuted a new campaign featuring Y2K celebrities to highlight its iconic lip gloss product. The campaign aims to evoke nostalgia and promote the idea that kisses are enhanced with Juicy Tubes. This heritage beauty brand chose to collaborate with various popular celebrities from the early 2000s to appeal to their target audience. The campaign is set to reach a wide audience and create buzz around the classic product.
news.headline: Lancôme honors iconic Juicy Tubes with Y2K celeb kisses. Nostalgic campaign showcases the OG gloss.

news.summary: A new Chief Information Security Officer Advisor has been appointed by a family-owned company to enhance information security protocols and promote cutting-edge cybersecurity practices. The Primex Family of Companies (PFOC) based in Lake Geneva, Wisconsin made this announcement on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Primex Family of Companies appoints new Chief Information Security Officer Advisor to enhance cybersecurity practices.

news.summary: Bitcoin hit a new all-time high on May 21, reaching $111,860 on Binance by May 22, but the markets lack the usual frenzy. Funding rates are subdued, indicating minimal speculative activity in futures trading. Long-term holders are not aggressively selling, suggesting confidence in further price appreciation. Stablecoin supply has risen, pointing to untapped liquidity and potential growth. Global M2 money supply increased by 5% in Q1 2025, correlating strongly with Bitcoin prices. Profit-taking among Bitcoin holders is restrained, reflecting confidence in ongoing price increases. The market is not in a state of euphoria, leaving room for new capital to enter. This article doesn't provide investment advice.
news.headline: Bitcoin's rally to $111,860 lacks FOMO and futures euphoria. Analysts predict further growth due to stablecoin rise and low speculative activity.
US 30-year fixed rate mortgages 6.86% May 22nd week vs 6.81% the prior week - Freddie Mac.

news.summary: On 22 May 2025, AKVA group ASA conducted its yearly general meeting where the minutes of the session can be accessed on the company's website at https://www.akvagroup.com/investors/general-meeting/.
news.headline: AKVA group ASA held its annual general meeting on May 22, 2025. Minutes available on company website.

news.summary: DeLorean has introduced a blockchain-based onchain reservation system and NFT marketplace for their upcoming electric vehicle, the Alpha 5 EV. Users holding the Build Slot NFT collection can access priority purchase for the car. DeLorean's first vehicle in over 40 years draws inspiration from the iconic flux capacitor from the movie Back to the Future. It will leverage blockchain technology to record vehicle details like battery health and maintenance history through the FLUX protocol. Holders can buy and trade NFTs using USDC stablecoin and earn rewards on the Sui network. The company aims to set a new standard in the automotive industry through blockchain integration and is the first carmaker to introduce a utility token, the DeLorean ($DMC) token. This move aligns with a trend where luxury brands are exploring blockchain and NFTs as digital passports for products, offering benefits like reservation, maintenance, resale, and membership services. Brands like Louis Vuitton have ventured into NFTs, offering exclusive product access to NFT holders. DeLorean's innovative approach reflects their commitment to integrating digital assets in their offerings, embracing technology and enhancing customer experience in the luxury car market.
news.headline: DeLorean tokenizes EV reservations on Sui platform with NFTs for upcoming Alpha 5 EV, marking a new era for auto industry. #DeLorean #EV #blockchain

news.summary: A prestigious luxury community in the highly desirable area of Lake Nona offers exclusive access to a wide range of amenities. Residents can enjoy top-notch facilities such as a state-of-the-art fitness center, spa, and swimming pools. The community also boasts beautifully landscaped grounds, walking trails, and access to a private golf course. With only a limited number of homes available, this sought-after community provides a unique opportunity for residents to live in luxury and style.
news.headline: Last chance to build luxury home at Laurel Pointe in Orlando, FL. Exclusive community includes sought-after amenities in Lake Nona.

news.summary: Euronext has reported a successful bond offering worth €425 million, due in 2032. These bonds are convertible into new shares and/or exchangeable for existing shares, known as "OCEANEs."
news.headline: Euronext's bond offering raises €425 million for convertible shares due 2032, marking a successful launch.

news.summary: Verimatrix has been recognized in the QKS Group SPARK Matrix™ as a technology leader in In-App Protection. The company earned strong ratings for its comprehensive in-app protection capabilities in both Technology Excellence and Customer Impact. Verimatrix was also named an Ace Performer for demonstrating revenue growth potential, partnership strategy, and customer acquisition over the last year. Analyst Ayush Patidar praised Verimatrix XTD for its robust and unified approach to application security, offering features like zero-code protection, AI-driven threat detection, and real-time response across various platforms. The study provides a detailed analysis of global market dynamics and competitive positioning in the in-app protection sector. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Verimatrix named a 2025 tech leader in In-App Protection by QKS Group, recognized for strong ratings & comprehensive capabilities.

news.summary: BTC has reached a new all-time high of $111,000 and is showing potential for a golden cross for the first time since October. The funding rates on major cryptocurrencies remain low, with BTC's open interest on Deribit hitting a record $42.5 billion. One hyperliquid whale has increased their BTC position to $1.1 billion, while miners were observed to have dumped BTC right before the ATH. HYPE has led a rally in Layer 1 blockchains, nearing their ATH. Cetus on SUI has faced an exploit, while IBIT is now in the top 5 for YTD inflows across all ETFs. VanEck is set to launch a private digital asset fund in June, and Binance is listing the WLFI stablecoin. SOL Mobile's 2nd Gen Seeker will start shipping on August 4. WLD has raised $135 million from VCs for expansion, while Synthetix has dropped a $27 million Derive deal. Hong Kong has passed a stablecoin bill, and there may have been a Coinbase leak in December. The FOMO HOUR podcast covers these updates and more in the crypto and macro spheres.
news.headline: BTC breaches new ATH of $111k, Texas passes BTC bill, InfoFi battle erupts. Major updates in cryptocurrency and macro spheres on FOMO HOUR.

news.summary: Sciaky Inc., a Chicago-based company, has recently disclosed the delivery of the initial large Electron Beam Welding (EBW) Machine to overseas clients. The VX-300 Electron Beam Welding machine was shipped in May 2025, with two more similar machines set to follow. This development marks a significant milestone for Sciaky Inc. in their global operations.
news.headline: Sciaky ships first of three large EBW machines to overseas customers, starting with VX-300 EB welding machine in May 2025.

news.summary: In Astana, Kazakhstan on May 22, 2025, the Bulat Utemuratov Foundation generously gifted 500 apartments to the Akimat (City Hall) of Astana to aid residents lacking housing. The donation, estimated at 10.5 billion tenge, forms part of the Foundation's ongoing efforts to assist the community.
news.headline: Bulat Utemuratov Foundation gifts 500 apartments to Astana, worth 10.5 billion tenge, aiding families in need.

news.summary: Consolidated Communications Holdings, LLC revealed the completion of its first fiber securitization deal totaling $1.344 billion. The transaction involved issuing asset-backed term notes (referred to as the “Notes”) secured by current and future fiber-enabled customers in specific states, along with the fiber optic and network infrastructure serving these customers. Simultaneously with the Notes offering, the company also...
news.headline: Consolidated Communications closes $1.344B asset-backed securitization and $1.5B revolving facility in Conroe, Texas.

news.summary: The report on the Colorado legal cannabis market reveals that in 2024, it was valued at USD 2.59 billion and is estimated to grow to USD 5.53 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.90%. The analysis covers various aspects such as sources (marijuana, hemp), derivatives (CBD, THC), cultivation methods (indoor, greenhouse), and end uses (recreational, medical). This data has been made available by ResearchAndMarkets.com, showcasing the significant growth prospects within the Colorado legal cannabis industry from 2025 to 2030.
news.headline: Colorado legal cannabis market valued at $2.59bn in 2024, projected to reach $5.53bn by 2030 at a CAGR of 12.90%.

news.summary: The shareholders have given their approval for the proposed dividend of 1.44 Euros per share, showing a substantial 21% raise from the previous year. This marks the highest dividend ever declared in the company's history, reflecting positive growth and financial performance. The ongoing successful implementation of the company's transformation and turnaround strategies is further solidifying its base for future development.
news.headline: Fresenius Medical Care AGM sees highest dividend per share at 1.44 Euro, up 21% from last year, reflecting strong performance.

news.summary: The National Credit Union Foundation, acting as the charitable arm of the credit union movement, revealed Catie McDonald as the new Chief in a recent announcement on May 22, 2025, in MADISON, Wis. This move is part of the foundation's dedication to enhancing financial well-being for all.
news.headline: National Credit Union Foundation appoints Catie McDonald as Chief Impact Officer to enhance financial well-being for all.

news.summary: New information will be presented at ASCO on June 1, 2025, regarding the 24-month follow-up data from a randomized Phase I segment of the Phase I/II trial of TG4050. This trial focuses on individuals with resected locally advanced head and neck cancer. The data being shared is significant as it provides insights into the long-term outcomes of participants in the trial. Such information is crucial in assessing the efficacy of TG4050 in this particular patient population. This presentation highlights the progress in understanding the impact of this treatment, indicating potential advancements in managing this type of cancer.
news.headline: Transgene to share 24-month Disease-Free Survival Data from All Patients in Phase I Trial of Cancer Vaccine TG4050 at ASCO 2025.

news.summary: On 22nd May 2025, Roche disclosed the approval of Susvimo® (ranibizumab injection) 100 mg/mL by the US FDA for diabetic retinopathy (DR) treatment. DR, a sight-threatening ailment, impacts nearly 10 million individuals in the US and over 100 million globally. This is the sole FDA-endorsed continuous delivery therapy that has exhibited the maintenance of vision in DR patients with just a single refill required every nine months. Susvimo is now accessible to US retina specialists and their DR patients who have positively responded to a minimum of two anti-vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF) injections.
news.headline: FDA approves Roche’s Susvimo for diabetic retinopathy, affecting 10M in US and 100M globally. Offers one refill every 9 months.

Mindr reaffirms its support for veterans, active duty members, and their families. In an effort to show its commitment, Mindr has announced plans to hire a significant number of individuals this year...
news.headline: Mindr reaffirms commitment to veterans and military families ahead of Memorial Day, emphasizing hiring efforts.

news.summary: Miami-based Arcadia Capital, a top strategic advisor and investment bank catering to technology and software industry leaders, recently acted as the sole financial advisor to Conquer. Conquer, a company backed by Camden Partners, successfully acquired Full Circle Insights, which was previously under Scaleworks. This acquisition marks the union of two industry frontrunners to establish the pioneering Salesforce-native closed-loop engagement platform. The platform will seamlessly combine marketing attribution, funnel analytics, and various other functionalities to enhance operations.
news.headline: Arcadia Capital advised Conquer on acquiring Full Circle Insights, creating a Salesforce-native engagement platform.
